root_text.sn37.33:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato mātugāmo visārado agāraṁ ajjhāvasati.
root_text.sn37.33:1.3: Pāṇātipātā paṭivirato ca hoti, adinnādānā paṭivirato ca hoti, kāmesumicchācārā paṭivirato ca hoti, musāvādā paṭivirato ca hoti, surāmerayamajjappamādaṭṭhānā paṭivirato ca hoti—
root_text.sn37.33:1.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato mātugāmo visārado agāraṁ ajjhāvasatī”ti.

translation_text.sn37.33:1.1: “Mendicants, a lady living at home with five qualities is self-assured.
translation_text.sn37.33:1.3: She doesn’t kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, lie, or consume beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.
translation_text.sn37.33:1.4: A lady living at home with these five qualities is self-assured.”
